Description             99.1     Press release issued by Pfizer Inc. on May 22, 2020 SIGNATURE Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned hereunto duly authorized.
Medivation issued a press release announcing entry into the Merger Agreement, which is attached as Exhibit 99.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K and incorporated by reference herein.
Pfizer's acquisition of Wyeth and that China's Ministry of Commerce has extended its review of Pfizer's regulatory submission beyond the initial 30-day period.

Wyeth ("Wyeth"), announcing the execution of an Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated as of January 25, 2009, by and among Pfizer, Wagner Acquisition Corp., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer and Wyeth.
Food and Drug Administration to market Lyrica™ (pregabalin capsules) for the management of neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy and postherpetic neuralgia.
